prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低录取位次分别为：2021年约12363名、2022年约13854名、2023年约10190名、2024年约26794名、2025年约20513名。2024年因 贵州省首次实施新高考（物理类/历史类），位次出现大幅波动，从2023年的10190名骤降至26794名，降幅超16000名；2025年迅速回升至20513名，反弹约6281名，显示考生对郑 州大学的报考热度正在恢复。近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次为20513名；2021–2025年物理类（理科）招生计划分别为：87人、88人、90人、98人、97人 ，整体呈小幅扩招趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为211工程、双一流建设 高校，软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第53位→2022年第51位→2023年第46位→2024年第50位→2025年第50位→2026年第44位，排名稳步提升，已进入全国前50强，学校综合 实力和影响力不断增强；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及投档线在全国范围出现溃败现象，黑龙江有考生以389分被录取的异常案例；2026年周期 声誉评价仍为偏负面，但主要涉及学校管理与校园安全舆情（如虐猫谣言澄清等），与招生直接相关的负面信号减弱。抖音热度排名总榜第8位，评价为高热，短视频平台曝光量 大，报考关注度持续升温。历史投档异常方面，2022年广西理科投档线暴跌近4万位，2025年黑龙江物理组出现断档，但2026年无新增投档异常记录。郑州大学作为综合性大学，在材料科学与工程、化学、临床医学、水利工程等领域具有传统优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、 电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学热度稳定，这些热门专业与郑州大学的工科、医科优势方向高度契合，有利于吸引高分考生。贵州省2026年高考总 人数约299000人，较2025年（物理类207171+历史类90087≈297258人）略有增加；按近年物理类占比约69%估算，2026年物理类考生约206310人，较2025年207171人微减约860人， 竞争压力基本持平。；郑州大学位于河南省郑州市，在贵州省招生占比约2%-4%（2025年约3.3%），属于省外招生比例适中 的211高校。作为中部地区综合性大学，对西南省份考生有一定吸引力，但受地理位置影响，热度不及东部沿海同类高校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：软科排名上升至第44 位、抖音高热关注度、热门工科医科专业持续升温，均指向报考竞争加剧（位次数字减小）；但2025年声誉偏负面、历史断档记录、2026年物理类考生微减等因素则形成一定缓冲 。，考虑学校排名上升和热度提升的正面效应，给予-200名的修正，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约20313名，区间19813–20813名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were: approximately 12,363 in 2021, 13,854 in 2022, 10,190 in 2023, 26,794 in 2024, and 20,513 in 2025. In 2024, due to Guizhou Province's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category/History Category), the ranking experienced significant fluctuation, dropping sharply from 10,190 in 2023 to 26,794 in 2024, a decrease of over 16,000 places; in 2025, it quickly rebounded to 20,513, an increase of about 6,281 places, indicating that candidates' enthusiasm for applying to Zhengzhou University is recovering. The fluctuation range has been large in recent two years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being 20,513; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category (Science) were: 87, 88, 90, 98, and 97 respectively, showing a slight overall expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 53rd in 2021 → 51st in 2022 → 46th in 2023 → 50th in 2024 → 50th in 2025 → 44th in 2026, with a steadily improving ranking, having entered the national top 50, and the university's comprehensive strength and influence are continuously increasing; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was somewhat negative, mainly involving a collapse in admission score lines nationwide, with an abnormal case of a candidate from Heilongjiang being admitted with a score of 389; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 cycle remains somewhat negative, but mainly involves university management and campus safety public opinion (such as the clarification of the cat abuse rumor, etc.), with negative signals directly related to admissions weakening. Douyin popularity ranking is 8th overall, evaluated as high heat, with large exposure on short video platforms, and the attention for applications continues to heat up. Regarding historical admission anomalies, the science admission score line in Guangxi in 2022 dropped by nearly 40,000 places, and in 2025, the Physics Group in Heilongjiang experienced a gap, but there were no new admission anomaly records in 2026. As a comprehensive university, Zhengzhou University has traditional advantages in fields such as Materials Science and Engineering, Chemistry, Clinical Medicine, and Water Conservancy Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity. These popular majors are highly aligned with Zhengzhou University's advantageous engineering and medical directions, which helps attract high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, slightly increased from 2025 (Physics Category 207,171 + History Category 90,087 ≈ 297,258); based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 69%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 206,310, a slight decrease of about 860 from 207,171 in 2025, with basically the same competitive pressure. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, and its enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 2%-4% (about 3.3% in 2025), which is a moderate proportion for out-of-province enrollment for a 211 university. As a comprehensive university in the central region, it has a certain appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces, but due to geographical location, its popularity is not as high as similar universities on the eastern coast.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors: the Soft Science ranking rising to 44th, high Douyin attention, and the continuous heating up of popular engineering and medical majors all point to intensified competition for applications (decreasing ranking number); however, the somewhat negative reputation in 2025, historical gap records, and a slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in 2026 provide some buffer. Considering the positive effects of the university's ranking rise and increased popularity, a correction of -200 places is applied, predicting the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 to be approximately 20,313, with a range of 19,813 to 20,813.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19,813–20,813, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19,813), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 20,813), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 majors as backups.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：历史类位次已连续5年后移，2026年招生计划持平、考 生数略增，位次后移趋势大概率延续；软科排名上升和抖音高热对整体报考热度有正面作用，但历史类（文科）并非郑州大学的传统强势领域，且法学分化、新闻传播明显劝退等 专业热度信号对文科报考形成一定制约。，考虑考生略增和位次后移趋势，给予+30名的修正，预测2026年历史类最低录取位次约2819名，区间240 0–3238名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were: approximately 1565 in 2021, 1677 in 2022, 1811 in 2023, 2691 in 2024, and 2789 in 2025. Overall, there is a continuous backward trend (ranking numbers increase year by year). In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the category changed from Liberal Arts to History, causing the ranking to jump from 1811 to 2691. In 2025, it continued to slightly shift backward to 2789, with a cumulative backward shift of about 978 positions over the past two years. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for History Category (Liberal Arts) were: 19, 18, 16, 17, and 19 students respectively, fluctuating between 16 and 19. The 2026 History Category plan is 19 students, unchanged from 2025, with no change in the plan.
3. [School Level] Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength, which also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation was negative, with admission score lines experiencing a collapse nationwide. In the 2026 cycle, the reputation remains negative but mainly involves management public opinion. Douyin (TikTok) heat ranking is 8th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, which helps increase overall application enthusiasm. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2022, Guangxi Science admission score line dropped sharply by nearly 40,000 positions, and in 2025, Heilongjiang Physics group experienced a gap, but the History Category (Liberal Arts) has no clear record of gaps. Zhengzhou University has traditional advantages in liberal arts fields such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism and Communication.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity ranges from recommended to differentiated and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended, and Teacher Training/Education is differentiated and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 30.3%, it is estimated that there will be about 90,597 History Category candidates in 2026, a slight increase of about 510 from 90,087 in 2025, leading to a slight increase in competition pressure. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, and its History Category enrollment in Guizhou Province accounts for about 2%-4%. As a 211 university in the central region, it has some appeal to Guizhou liberal arts candidates, but due to its geographical location and the school's positioning as a strong engineering school, the appeal of liberal arts majors is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors: History Category rankings have been shifting backward for five consecutive years. With the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged and a slight increase in candidates, the backward trend is likely to continue. The rise in Soft Science ranking and high Douyin heat have a positive effect on overall application enthusiasm, but History Category (Liberal Arts) is not a traditional strong area for Zhengzhou University, and major popularity signals such as Law differentiation and clear discouragement of Journalism and Communication impose certain constraints on liberal arts applications. Considering the slight increase in candidates and the backward trend, a correction of +30 positions is applied, predicting the 2026 History Category minimum admission ranking to be approximately 2819, with a range of 2400 to 3238.
